mapper.select: SELECT LEVEL_ID, REQUIRED_EXP FROM LEVEL_POLICIES ORDER BY LEVEL_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXP_HISTORIES ( EXP_LOG_ID, USER_ID, GAINED_EXP, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_ID, GAINED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_EXP_HISTORIES.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{gainedExp}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRUNC(ATTENDANCE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCES( ATTENDANCE_ID, USER_ID, ATTENDANCE_DATE )VALUES( SEQ_ATTENDANCES.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(ATTENDANCE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM ATTENDANCES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ATTENDANCE_DATE DESC
